name: ReactBits Tilted Card
description: A creative card wrapper that tilts dynamically relative to the mouse hover coordinates with perspective overlays.

name: ReactBits True Focus Text
description: An interactive hover-based text effect that focuses individual words while blurring adjacent ones using viewport intersection checks.

name: ReactComponents Glass Time Card
description: A glassmorphism-styled card displaying a digital clock, calendar details, and local timezone headers.

name: Shadcn UI Sidebar Navigation
description: An administrative sidebar navigation menu featuring logo areas, collapsible navigation links, nested sections, and a footer profile button.
